name: Central Bus Svc Inc
notes: No SAFER record found. Wildcard searches for *CENTRAL BUS* and *CENTRAL BUS SERVICE* in SAFER returned only out-of-state matches (East Central Bus Service in Finlayson MN; Illinois Central School Bus LLC; Kansas Central School Bus - both in Joliet IL). Direct SAFER keyword searches returned 'no records' for 'CENTRAL BUS', 'CENTRAL BUS SVC', and 'CENTRAL SCHOOL BUS' in PA. PA Department of State business search not accessible via WebFetch (403). Companies searched at OpenCorporates and Corporation Wiki returned no public results. Coudersport is in Potter County, PA - very small rural town (zip 16915); 13 Oak Ln is residential. This appears to be a very small private school-bus contractor with minimal/no public footprint - possibly defunct, possibly operating only intrastate without USDOT (some PA school bus operators carrying <16 passengers don't require USDOT registration). Recommend phone outreach via Coudersport Area School District (814-274-8500).
